preferred_name: High/single pressure side process case variables

preferred_name_ml.en: High/single pressure side process case variables
preferred_name_ml.fr: Variables dans le cas du processus à pression unique/haute

definition: properties characterizing the measured variables, phases, operating state conditions and physical properties of a process material of a pressure measurement point or the high pressure part of a differential pressure measurement point

definition_ml.en: properties characterizing the measured variables, phases, operating state conditions and physical properties of a process material of a pressure measurement point or the high pressure part of a differential pressure measurement point
definition_ml.fr: propriétés caractérisant les variables mesurées, phases, conditions d'état fonctionnel et propriétés physiques d'un matériau de processus d'un point de mesure de pression ou de la partie haute pression d'un point de mesure de pression différentielle
definition_ml.de: Merkmale, die die Messgrößen, Phasen, Betriebszustandsbedingungen und physikalischen Eigenschaften eines Prozessmediums an einem Druckmesspunkt oder an der Hochdruckseite eines Differenzdruckmesspunkts kennzeichnen

raw_properties.MDC_P004.en: High/single pressure side process case variables
